definition:
1. Dep. 
2. to draw up, furl  sails, (Odyssey by Homer): to draw up  cables, etc., [variant datesAnthology Palantina:—; κρόκα ἐν στήμονι μηρύσασθαι to weave  the woof into the warp, (Hesiod) 
3. Pass., κισσὸς μαρύεται περὶ χείλη ivy winds  round the edge, (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus) (ML)
